mission.title: podman-container-tools: Add support to migrate data in boltdb to sqlite
mission.description: Add support to migrate data in boltdb to sqlite. Requested by 53+ users.

steps.title: Check current podman-container-tools setup
steps.description:
Verify your podman-container-tools version and configuration:
```bash
podman --version
```
This feature requires a working podman-container-tools installation.

steps.title: Review podman-container-tools configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant podman-container-tools configuration:
### Feature request description

With version 6.0 boltdb is being removed, ahead of this in version 5.7.0 the message `The deprecated BoltDB database driver is in use. This driver will be removed in the upcoming Podman 6.0 release in mid 2026.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Add support to migrate data in boltdb to sqlite
steps.description:
This is gated behind a new option in `podman system migrate`, `--migrate-db`.

The basic logic is simple:
* Podman is already configured to use BoltDB
* Open a new, fresh SQLite database to write into
* Migrate all database contents as they exist in BoltDB, to SQLite. ** Do this as simply as possible: grab the object from the old DB
   and write it into the new DB using the standard Add and Save
   functions.
* Set the new database in the Runtime, close the old one.
* Move the old database file

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Add support to migrate data in boltdb to sqlite" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
This is gated behind a new option in `podman system migrate`, `--migrate-db`.

The basic logic is simple:
* Podman is already configured to use BoltDB
* Open a new, fresh SQLite database to write into
* Migrate all database contents as they exist in BoltDB, to SQLite.

prerequisites.description: A working podman-container-tools installation or development environment.
